category_sources: source_facts.description says Japanese morphological analysis system; official GitHub README describes Japanese Morphological Analysis System JUMAN.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses Japanese Morphological Analysis System JUMAN; source_facts.name is juman.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README says to see doc/manual.pdf for how to use JUMAN and lists doc/ as the manual directory.
repo_sources: Official-looking ku-nlp GitHub repository README names JUMAN and lists project source directories, manual, and Kyoto NLP contact; source_facts.homepage points to Kyoto University Language Media Processing Lab.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Japanese morphological analysis; official GitHub README names JUMAN and documents source, dictionary, Perl module, and manual directories.
